case_title: PATEL, RAMAN B vs. KLOTZ, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL #620 S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFWILL WAIVE BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY. IF NOT, PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMT. FOR $300.00 PAST DUE RENT AND $13.33 PER DAY FROM 5/1/93 TO 6/1/93. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B AS TO DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KLOTZ, JOHN BULLARD, JOHN

DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-17-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-24-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
3:15 P.M. JURY ROOM, PETER N. FOWLER, PRO TEM JUDGE.

3:15 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLTF. WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY ATTY. ARNOLD W. EVJE II. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. TERMS: PLTF. TO HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE, LEASE IS FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 6/1/93 5:00 P.M. NO FURTHER STAYS PERMIT- TED. IF BOTH DEFENDANTS KLOTZ AND BULLARD VACATE BY GIVEN DATE AND TIME, PLTF. TO WAIVE PAST DUE RENTS AND DAILY DAM- AGES TO 6/1/93. IF NOT OUT BY 6/1/93, PLTF. TO HAVE JUDG- MENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $300.00 AND $13.13 PER DAY FROM 5/1/93 TO 6/1/93 AND COST OF $80.00. GENERAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF THE LANDLORD TENANT RELATIONSHIP OF THE PARTIES. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISE AFTER 6/1/93 DEEMED ABANDONED BY DEFENDNTS; PLTF TO DISPOSE OF AS HE SEES FIT. NO OTHER ADULTS OCCUPY THE SUBJECT PREMISE. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTY. FEES AND COST.
